requirement_topic.en: EMC Evidence for PV Inverter Export to Albania
requirement_topic.zh: 出口至阿尔巴尼亚光伏逆变器的EMC证据
requirement_topic.zht: 出口至阿爾巴尼亞光伏逆變器的EMC證據

summary.en: Albania-facing PV inverter EMC evidence should be prepared around IEC 61000 test methods and IEC 62920. ERE and OST may require EMC evidence as part of grid-connection or net-metering documentation. Project documents can also add local utility expectations for harmonic limits, voltage ride-through, and site interface conditions.
summary.zh: 面向阿尔巴尼亚的光伏逆变器EMC证据应围绕IEC 61000测试方法和IEC 62920准备。ERE与OST可能在并网或净计量文件中要求EMC证据。项目文件还可能补充当地电网企业对谐波、低压穿越和现场接口条件的要求。
summary.zht: 面向阿爾巴尼亞的光伏逆變器 EMC 證據應圍繞 IEC 61000 測試方法和 IEC 62920 準備。ERE 與 OST 可能在併網或淨計量文件中要求 EMC 證據。項目文件還可能補充當地電網企業對諧波、低壓穿越和現場介面條件的要求。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62920 — Photovoltaic power generating systems — EMC requirements and test methods for power conversion equipment
IEC 61000 series — electromagnetic compatibility test methods and limits
ERE / OST project documentation requirements where connection is requested

summary.en: China PV inverter EMC evidence commonly relies on GB/T 37408-2021, NB/T 32004, and CNAS-accredited laboratory reports under China domestic requirements. These reports support technical comparison, but they are not substitutes for IEC 62920 and project-specified IEC 61000 evidence.
summary.zh: 中国光伏逆变器EMC证据通常基于GB/T 37408-2021、NB/T 32004以及CNAS认可实验室按中国国内要求的测试报告。该证据可用于技术对照，但不能替代IEC 62920和项目指定的IEC 61000证据。
summary.zht: 中國光伏逆變器 EMC 證據通常基於 GB/T 37408-2021、NB/T 32004 以及 CNAS 認可實驗室按中國國內要求的測試報告。該證據可用於技術對照，但不能替代IEC 62920和項目指定的IEC 61000證據。

standards_or_laws: China test reports and domestic acceptance records

gap.en: Map Chinese EMC evidence clause-by-clause to IEC 62920 and relevant IEC 61000 tests before Albania submission. Exporters should prepare model-specific reports from internationally accepted labs, confirm any differences in test conditions, and align documentation to the Albania site configuration before energisation.
gap.zh: 提交阿尔巴尼亚前应将中国EMC证据逐条映射到IEC 62920和相关IEC 61000测试。出口商应准备针对具体型号、由国际认可实验室出具的报告，确认与中国测试条件的差异，并在送电前按阿尔巴尼亚现场配置对齐文件。
gap.zht: 提交阿爾巴尼亞前應將中國 EMC 證據逐條映射到 IEC 62920和相關 IEC 61000 測試。出口商應準備針對具體型號、由國際認可實驗室出具的報告，確認與中國測試條件差異，並在送電前按阿爾巴尼亞現場配置對齊文件。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory where required by ERE/OST project review, net-metering, or local utility acceptance; evidence scope is model and site specific
mandatory_status.cn: Chinese GB/T/NB/T EMC evidence may support domestic review but is not a direct Albania market substitute

source.publisher: International Electrotechnical Commission (IEC) and Albanian utility-referenced utility expectations

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Do not rely on Chinese GB/T 37408-2021 or NB/T 32004 EMC evidence alone for Albania. Prepare IEC 62920 and IEC 61000 reports for the exact inverter model, then confirm acceptance with ERE, OST, and the project owner.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 不要仅依赖中国GB/T 37408-2021或NB/T 32004 EMC证据进入阿尔巴尼亚。请为具体逆变器型号准备IEC 62920和IEC 61000报告，并与ERE、OST及项目业主确认可接受性。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 不要僅依賴中國 GB/T 37408-2021 或 NB/T 32004 EMC 證據進入阿爾巴尼亞。請為具體逆變器型號準備 IEC 62920 和 IEC 61000 報告，並與 ERE、OST 及項目業主確認可接受性。
